Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

fix(ci): pass RELEASE_TOKEN to checkout for git push auth

The checkout step configures git credentials. Without passing the PAT
here, git push still uses the default GITHUB_TOKEN which cannot
bypass branch protection.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

fix(ci): use RELEASE_TOKEN for semantic-release push

GITHUB_TOKEN cannot bypass branch protection required status checks.
Use a fine-grained PAT (RELEASE_TOKEN) with admin permissions instead.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

fix(ci): move build from patch_tags to other_allowed_tags

Renovate build(deps): commits were triggering patch releases, which
failed against branch protection. Aligns with all other repos.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

Implement main application structure with routing and components (#28)

* feat: add main application structure with routing and layout

- Created App component with routing setup for Home, About, News, and Not Found pages.
- Added SiteLayout for consistent header and footer across pages.
- Implemented BookCard and BookGrid components for displaying book information.
- Developed AboutPage and HomePage with respective styles.
- Introduced NewsPage for newsletter sign-up with Mailchimp integration.
- Created NotFoundPage for handling 404 errors.
- Established site-wide configuration in siteConfig.js for navigation and metadata.
- Added CSS styles for layout, header, footer, and pages.
- Integrated FontAwesome for social media icons.
- Set up Vite for development and build processes.

* feat: add redirect rule for index.html

* book card changes

* feat: book details popup with more information on the book.

* feat: animation for book pop-up

* Feat: add animation for close

* feat: better links in the footer

* seo optimisation (hardcoded domain)

* feat: accessibility changes

* feat: adjust about page

* feat: tidier animaion for popup.

* refactor

* logo hover animation

* Add in coverage

* Apply PR review feedback: security, accessibility, domain consistency, and typo fixes (#19)

* feat: add Card and Modal components for book and news post display

- Implemented Card component with hover effects and accessibility features.
- Created Modal component for displaying detailed news posts with animations.
- Added styles for Card and Modal components in respective CSS files.
- Developed NewsPostModal component to integrate with the Modal for displaying news content.
- Introduced hooks for managing book and news post data, including useSourceCollection for fetching data.
- Updated HomePage and NewsPage to utilize new components and hooks, enhancing the UI and UX.
- Refactored existing styles to accommodate new components and ensure consistency across the application.
- Updated README.

commit.message:
docs: add missing docstrings to all identified functions and classes

Cover every item flagged by the AST check:

EarlyStopping.py
  - EarlyStopping.__init__

advanced_losses.py
  - VGGPerceptualLossV2.__init__
  - ContrastiveLoss.__init__
  - UVCGANLoss.__init__
  - _single (nested in _lsgan_disc_loss)

discriminator.py
  - PatchDiscriminator.__init__

generator.py
  - ReZeroTransformerBlock.__init__
  - PixelwiseViT.__init__ / forward
  - ConvBlock (class + __init__ + forward)
  - DownsampleBlock (class + __init__ + forward)
  - UpsampleBlock (class + __init__ + forward)
  - ViTUNetGenerator.__init__ / forward

losses.py
  - VGGPerceptualLoss.__init__
  - CycleGANLoss.__init__

spectral_norm_discriminator.py
  - SpectralNormDiscriminator.__init__
  - MultiScaleDiscriminator.__init__

training_loop_v2.py
  - lr_lambda (nested in _make_lr_lambda)

uvcgan_v2_generator.py
  - _get_1d_sincos_pos_embed / _get_2d_sincos_pos_embed
  - LayerScaleTransformerBlock.__init__ / forward
  - PixelwiseViTV2.__init__ / forward
  - ResidualConvBlock.__init__
  - DownBlock.__init__
  - UpBlock.__init__
  - CrossDomainFusion.__init__
  - ViTUNetGeneratorV2.__init__

All files verified with py_compile.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

commit.message:

commit.message:
refactor: extract helper functions for improved code maintainability

- Extract skipPushDataFields() and readPushDataWithError() in chain/blockchain.go to reduce duplication in name script parsing (16 lines → 2 calls)
- Extract validateNameScriptParams() and appendP2PKHScript() in wallet/wallet.go to consolidate script building logic across NAME_UPDATE, NAME_NEW, and NAME_FIRSTUPDATE
- Extract buildNameTxBase(), addChangeOutput(), and signTransactionInputs() in wallet/wallet.go to reduce duplication in CreateNameUpdateTx and CreateNameUpdateTxRaw (58 lines → 3 calls)
- Extract checkContextAndState() in client/embedded.go to consolidate context and closed-state validation in ResolveName and GetNameHistory

All functions maintain existing behavior and error handling. Refactoring reduces code duplication ratio and improves long-term maintainability without functional changes.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

commit.message:
refactor: extract validation and utility functions in chain and RPC

Improves code maintainability and testability by breaking down large
functions into smaller, focused helpers:

chain/blockchain.go:
- Extract validateTransactionNameOps() for per-transaction validation
- Extract collectNameOperationTypes() to identify operation types
- Extract validateNameOpFees() for transaction fee validation
- Extract validateNameOutputs() for iterating transaction outputs
- Extract dispatchNameOpValidation() for operation-specific handlers
- Remove unnecessary inline comments in validateNameOperations()

rpc/server.go:
- Extract validateListUnspentState() for wallet/blockchain checks
- Extract parseListUnspentParams() for parameter parsing
- Extract extractAddressFilter() for address list parsing
- Extract resolveTargetAddresses() to resolve address targets
- Extract collectFilteredUTXOs() for UTXO filtering logic
- Extract buildUTXOResult() for UTXO result formatting
- Extract calculateConfirmations() for confirmation counting
- Improve error handling and parameter validation

These changes follow Single Responsibility Principle, making the code
easier to test, maintain, and extend with new functionality.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

commit.message:
refactor(chain): extract validateNameOperations helpers to reduce cyclomatic complexity

Split the validateNameOperations function into focused helper functions:
- validateNameNewOp: Validates NAME_NEW operations (CC=4)
- validateNameFirstUpdateOp: Validates NAME_FIRSTUPDATE operations (CC=8)
- validateNameUpdateOp: Validates NAME_UPDATE operations (CC=8)
- determineBlockHeight: Calculates block height for validation (CC=5)
- newNameValidationContext: Creates validation context for tracking state (CC=1)

Reduces validateNameOperations CC from 33 to 16, improving maintainability.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

repository.name: nmcd
repository.description: Pure Go Namecoin using btcd as library dependencies

commit.message:
refactor: reduce cyclomatic complexity in client and chain packages

- client/embedded.go: Extract 5 helper functions from RegisterName and UpdateName
  - validateRegistrationInputs: validates name/value length constraints
  - resolveOwnerAddress: determines owner address from options or wallet
  - convertToWalletUTXOs: converts namedb UTXO list to wallet format
  - findNameNewUTXO: locates NAME_NEW UTXO by transaction hash
  - findNameUTXO: finds specific UTXO by hash and output index
  - Reduces RegisterName CC from 36→28, UpdateName CC from 30→26
  - All helper functions have CC ≤ 5

- chain/blockchain.go: Extract name operation validation helpers
  - nameValidationContext: tracks duplicates within block scope
  - validateNameNewOp: validates NAME_NEW operation constraints
  - validateNameFirstUpdateOp: validates NAME_FIRSTUPDATE with commitment verification
  - validateNameUpdateOp: validates NAME_UPDATE with UTXO chain verification
  - Improves code clarity and maintainability of name operation validation

- Remove redundant comments that duplicate code intent

- Update PLAN.md Step 8 with refactoring completion status

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

commit.message:
Fix: djmdColor schema uses 'Commnt' not 'Name'

Column name is Commnt (comment) with one 'm', not Name.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

Revert: USB DB reads fine, remove unnecessary error handling

Rekordbox-created USB DBs use the same SQLCipher key and are readable.
The original error was likely a transient issue or corrupted DB file.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

Handle corrupt USB DB gracefully: backup and recreate

When existing USB DB can't be read (corrupted or wrong encryption),
back it up and treat as fresh export. Prevents crashes on corrupted USBs.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

Fix: use init_usb_db() for fresh DB after wipe

Ensures proper SQLCipher setup with PRAGMA key before schema creation.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

Fix USB wipe timeout: skip slow file scan, increase timeout to 1h

Removed rglob file counting (bottleneck on large USB over slow I/O).
Now just lists directories to wipe and proceeds directly.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>
